title: Company profile (cold prospect)
description: Researched profile of a target company for a speculative application. Every factual claim must be traceable to a source URL; inferred fields are marked as such.

company_name.description: Canonical company name as presented on the company's own site (may differ from the user-supplied input).

canonical_url.description: The company's own primary website URL (not a LinkedIn or Indeed page). Empty string if the company has no discoverable website.

size_band.description: Coarse size bucket. startup = <50, scaleup = 50-250, midmarket = 250-2000, enterprise = 2000+.

headcount_estimate.description: Numeric estimate when a source provides one (Indeed, LinkedIn, press). Null when no source gives a number.

locations.description: Known office locations or HQ + notable satellites, e.g. 'Paris, FR'.

mission_statement.description: The company's own framing of what they do and why, quoted or closely paraphrased from their site. Empty string if not available.

products_services.description: Concrete products or service lines, in their own words where possible.

tech_stack_hints.description: Technologies the company likely uses, inferred from job listings / GitHub / blog posts. Always treated as inferred, not fact.

values_culture_signals.description: Stated values, cultural signals, work-style cues from Careers / About / Team pages.

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) or YYYY-MM if day unknown.

relevance.description: One-line note on why this item matters for the cold approach.

leadership.description: Named contacts relevant to a cold approach (CTO, VP Eng, hiring managers). Only include names that appear on a cited public source.

hiring_signals.description: Evidence the company is actively hiring (open reqs, LinkedIn hiring banner, press mentions of growth).

pain_points_inferred.description: Plausible challenges the company may be facing, inferred from news/product/hiring signals. Always inferred — never presented as fact.

research_gaps.description: Things we could not verify (e.g. 'LinkedIn company page gated', 'no leadership names surfaced', 'tech stack not discoverable'). Non-empty when research is thin.

fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the source was read.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this profile was assembled.

input_raw.description: The original user-supplied company name or URL, preserved for audit.
